business_ideas.idea: Deepfake/AI voice personalization for customer messages at scale
Voice cloning platform (like airwriter.app) for deceased authors/celebrities
Podcast The Shake Up interviewing business leaders about pivotal decisions
Solo capitalist individual VC fund with 2-3% management fees
Pipe - non-dilutive capital for SaaS companies with recurring revenue
Hoppin - virtual and hybrid conference/networking platform
Primer - online education platform for kids learning specific skills
Alumni network syndicates for group venture investing

predictions.text: Climate change and crypto will be underfunded venture categories with significant opportunities
Post-pandemic, more people building companies around things they genuinely care about
Top 20 universities remain worth debt due to network and credential value
Solo capitalist model will proliferate as more individuals start own funds
Venture capital being disrupted by non-dilutive alternatives like Pipe
